name: codetruth-os
description: CodeTruth OS — Institutional-grade project cognition platform (V1 Truth Engine)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @codetruth/core && npm run build -w @codetruth/billing -w @codetruth/governance -w @codetruth/compliance -w @codetruth/parsing -w @codetruth/ingestion -w @codetruth/reconstruction -w @codetruth/spatial -w @codetruth/evaluation -w @codetruth/llm -w @codetruth/truth-council -w @codetruth/planning -w @codetruth/reports -w @codetruth/storage -w @codetruth/pipeline -w @codetruth/github && npm run build -w @codetruth/cognition && npm run build -w @codetruth/queue && npm run build -w @codetruth/api -w @codetruth/worker
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run dev -w @codetruth/api
scripts.dev:pg: npm run db:up && npm run db:push && npm run dev
scripts.dev:async: npm run infra:up && npm run db:push && npm run build && npm run dev -w @codetruth/api
